title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Puma India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Puma India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!
